description: Full theme system - multiple UI restyling themes (not just dark/light), admin-controlled, with system default detection. Current style preserved as default. Include Kiro and GitHub themes.
steps: 1. Redesign panel/panel/web/shared/composables/useTheme.ts to support a two-level theme system: (a) 'mode' = 'system' | 'dark' | 'light' - controls dark/light toggle with system detection as default, (b) 'theme' = 'midnight' | 'kiro' | 'github' | 'soft-dark' | 'corporate' - controls the full UI restyle (color palette, card styles, border styles, accent colors). The mode defaults to 'system' which uses window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)'). Add a mediaQuery listener that updates reactively when system preference changes. Store mode in localStorage key 'koris-mode' (default 'system'). Store theme in localStorage key 'koris-ui-theme' (default 'midnight'). Apply both: data-mode attribute for dark/light, data-ui-theme attribute for the restyle. Export: mode (ref), theme (ref), isDark (computed), setMode(mode), setTheme(theme), availableThemes (array of {id, name, description}).

2. Create theme definitions in panel/panel/web/shared/styles/tokens.css: The current dark color scheme (:root) is preserved as the 'midnight' theme (DEFAULT - user explicitly said they like it). Add attribute-based theme overrides: [data-ui-theme='kiro'] - Kiro brand colors (teal/cyan primary #06b6d4, dark navy background #0c1222, accent purple #a78bfa, surface #1a2332, border #2d3b4d, text white), [data-ui-theme='github'] - GitHub-inspired colors (dark: bg #0d1117, surface #161b22, border #30363d, primary #58a6ff, accent #7ee787, text #c9d1d9; light: bg #ffffff, surface #f6f8fa, border #d0d7de, primary #0969da, accent #1a7f37, text #24292f), [data-ui-theme='soft-dark'] - Softer dark with warmer tones (bg #1a1b26, surface #24283b, border #414868, primary #7aa2f7, accent #9ece6a, muted #565f89), [data-ui-theme='corporate'] - Clean professional (bg #f8fafc, surface #ffffff, border #e5e7eb, primary #4f46e5, accent #0891b2, text #111827 - always light mode). Each theme should override --color-bg, --color-surface, --color-surface-2, --color-border, --color-text, --color-muted, --color-primary, --color-accent/brand-2, --color-success, --color-warning, --color-danger, --gradient-brand, --shadow-* variables.

3. Add theme selection UI in admin SettingsView.vue (panel/panel/web/admin/src/views/SettingsView.vue): Add a new section in the panel-settings tab for 'UI Theme'. Show theme cards/swatches that the admin can select. Show a mode selector (System Default / Dark / Light) as a radio group or segmented control - with System Default as the first/default option. When admin saves, persist the theme choice to the backend via PATCH /api/panel-settings with keys 'ui_theme' and 'ui_mode'. On app load, read from /api/panel-settings and apply.

4. Load theme from panel-settings on both admin and portal app startup. In both panel/panel/web/admin/src/main.ts and panel/panel/web/portal/src/main.ts (or App.vue), fetch /api/panel-settings on mount and apply the stored theme + mode using the useTheme composable. This ensures all users (admin and customers) see the admin-chosen theme.

5. Update panel/panel/web/admin/src/style.css: Add theme-specific overrides where tokens.css variables don't cover everything (e.g., specific component styles that use hardcoded colors). Ensure .sidebar, .auth-screen, .toast, .modal etc adapt to all themes.
6. Add i18n keys for theme-related labels in en/fa/zh: theme names, mode names (System/Dark/Light), descriptions for each theme.
acceptance_criteria: Default mode is 'system' which auto-detects dark/light from OS preference
Admin can switch between System/Dark/Light mode in settings
Five themes available: Midnight (current/default), Kiro, GitHub, Soft Dark, Corporate
Current style is preserved exactly as the 'Midnight' theme
Kiro theme uses teal/cyan primary with dark navy background
GitHub theme matches GitHub's dark UI palette (blue primary, green accent)
Theme selection is persisted to panel_settings table via API
Both admin panel and portal use the admin-selected theme
Only admin can change theme - no theme picker shown to customers
Theme labels are translated in en/fa/zh
findings: All verification passed: vue-tsc --noEmit (admin + portal), vite build (both), vitest run (admin + shared). Theme system uses additive CSS selectors - no existing styles removed. data-ui-theme attribute layered on top of existing data-theme mode system. Corporate theme forces light mode via forcedMode property. System mode is default and uses matchMedia listener for reactive changes.
